author: NRG Gus
title: Beats don't even compare th the JBLs
body: Love them. Expected my spouse's Beats Pro Studio to sound better, BUT... theses headphones surpass the Beats in sound quality. The rich bass and highs clarity are as impressive as my JBL M-Pro audio speakers.

author: jackpinoh
title: JBL Headphones Are the Best
body: I have owned headphones from four different, highly rated companies, I just bought a second pair of JBL Tour One M2 headphones (first pair for the living room; second pair for the master bedroom). Headphones from other companies had serious problems: Ear covers falling apart, failure to remain connected, etc. My JBL headphones connect every time, are comfortable, are well built, and produce great sound.

author: Jabta
title: Great Quality
body: The JBL headphones are an awesome addition to my television system. As my wife teaches piano in the adjacent room, these headphones cut out all external noise and allows me to hear my audiobooks easily. They are light in weight and the battery lasts a lot longer than my previous set.

title: Good Sound and comfortable
body: These Headphones are awesome i've had a few pairs. The sound is good, however there are a few things that drive me nuts. If you wear glasses and are working-out they DO NOT seal all the noise when in "noise canceling" mode, because there are air spaces when headphones make contact with glasses arms.

author: Randyshark7
title: Super headphones
body: Great sound great and great functionality!! The best headphones ever!!

author: BenAL
title: Underwhelmed
body: Love my other JBL products. These are fine, expected more for the price. May return for a less expensive version or a different brand.

author: big pimpin
body: super comfy headphones, my old jbls were a few years old thought it might sound better but it sounded the same

author: Matthew76
title: Poor Quality?
body: After charging for several hours the expensive Tour One M2 don't seem to work. It is frustrating when you purchase a product from the vendor and they arrive faulty.
